# Communication Plan Template

Use this when decommissioning affects customers, users, support teams, operators, integrators, or internal stakeholders.

## Audiences

| Audience | Impact | Message | Channel | Owner | Date |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Message requirements

- What is changing.
- Why it is changing.
- Who is affected.
- Migration path or replacement.
- Important dates.
- Support/escalation path.
- Rollback or extension policy.

## Communication timeline

- Initial notice:
- Reminder:
- Migration deadline warning:
- Cutover notice:
- Completion notice:

## Support readiness

- FAQ updated.
- Runbook updated.
- Escalation owner assigned.
- Known issues documented.
- Status-page or release-note requirements captured.

## Evidence

- Links to docs, messages, issues, PRs, or release notes.
- Unverified assumptions requiring owner confirmation.
